name: dev-ports
title: Dev Ports
description: Identify your local development servers without digging through terminal tabs and process lists.
author: mike_dloss

commands.name: open-dev-ports
commands.title: Open Dev Ports
commands.description: List, open, copy, and kill local development ports.

preferences.name: showAllPortsByDefault
preferences.title: Show All Ports by Default
preferences.label: Show all ports by default
preferences.description: Include every listening TCP port instead of only likely development servers.

preferences.name: defaultHost
preferences.title: Default URL Host
preferences.description: Choose the host used when opening or copying a local server URL.

preferences.name: confirmBeforeKill
preferences.title: Confirm Before Kill
preferences.label: Confirm before kill
preferences.description: Ask for confirmation before sending SIGTERM to a process.

preferences.name: preferredTerminal
preferences.title: Preferred Terminal
preferences.description: Choose which terminal app to focus when using the terminal action.

preferences.name: preferredIDE
preferences.title: Preferred IDE
preferences.description: Choose the editor or IDE used by the primary project-open action.

preferences.name: confirmBeforeForceKill
preferences.title: Confirm Before Force Kill
preferences.label: Confirm before force kill
preferences.description: Ask for confirmation before sending SIGKILL to a process.

preferences.name: closeAfterOpening
preferences.title: Close Raycast After Opening URL
preferences.label: Close Raycast after opening URL
preferences.description: Close the Raycast window after opening a local server in the browser.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
